test.name: Wikipedia summary request should not trigger locality-guide
test.description: User asks for a Wikipedia summary of a place. That's wiki-lookup — locality-guide is specifically a records-availability research guide, not a general place description. A user who wants to know the history, geography, or population of Schuylkill County wants wiki-lookup; a user who wants to know what genealogy records exist there wants locality-guide.

input.user_message: Look up Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania on Wikipedia and save the summary.

negative.explanation: The user explicitly named Wikipedia and asked for the summary to be saved as a file — that's wiki-lookup's exact workflow. locality-guide produces a research-records guide consulting the place_search, place_collections, and place_external_links MCP tools; it doesn't write Wikipedia summaries to disk.

judge_context: Should route to wiki-lookup rather than producing a locality records guide in response to a 'look up on Wikipedia' request
